title: Trust & Safety
content:
Kenyan Sourced, Trusted Quality

Did you know imported pet food spends up to 6 months inside hot shipping containers before reaching Kenyan shelves? By choosing PetStore Kenya, you support local contract farmers and feed your pets food manufactured right here in Kenya.

Our Local Manufacturing Partners

  • Lake Victoria Fishery Communities: Premium Omena products sourced directly from small-scale fishers in Kisumu & Homa Bay.
  • Sigma Foods Ltd (Bravo Pet Food): State-of-the-art poultry formulation strictly conforming to AAFCO nutritional standards.
  • Gilani's Gourmet (Beef Biltong): Single-ingredient treats made from free-range Rift Valley beef.
  • Farmers Choice (Team Pet): Quality grain and meat formulations bagged daily at local processing plants.
  • T.L.C. & Scooby: Grain-free dog rice and fortified veterinary diets milled in Eldoret County.
excerpt: Learn why buying local Kenyan pet food is fresher, cheaper, and healthier for your pets than imported brands.
